description_long: This is a modern office building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring three visible stories. The facade is dominated by large, regularly spaced windows, with the middle floor showcasing a prominent, angular bay of glass that juts outward, creating a dynamic visual break in the otherwise linear structure. The ground floor is lined with tall, continuous glass panels, likely serving as the main entrance and lobby area, while the upper floors have smaller, evenly distributed windows. The exterior is clad in a light-colored material, possibly concrete or composite panels, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The building's design emphasizes horizontal lines and geometric regularity, with minimal ornamentation. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, reinforcing its utilitarian, business-oriented function.
description: A modern, three-story office building with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a clean, light-colored facade. The middle floor features an angular glass bay, adding visual interest to the otherwise linear structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the regular grid of windows and the flat roof, with the ground floor lined by tall glass panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth and the angular projection of the middle floor's glass bay.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view highlighting the prominent angular glass bay on the middle floor and the regular window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length and the consistent window pattern, with the angular bay visible in profile.
attribute_window_pattern: Horizontally aligned, rectangular windows in a regular grid pattern; ground floor features continuous glass panels, middle floor has an angular bay of glass, upper floors have evenly spaced windows.
